message:
🌱 Fix SEO: duplicate titles, add robots.txt, sitemap.xml, OG/Twitter meta (#30)

- Fix duplicate site name in <title> tags by removing redundant '| AquaAutomate'
  from child page metadata (root layout template already appends it)
- Add robots.ts for search engine crawl directives
- Add sitemap.ts with all static pages, guides, blog posts, and species
- Add Open Graph and Twitter Card meta tags to root layout and dynamic pages
  (guides, products, blog posts) for proper social sharing previews
- Increase collections page revalidation from 60s to 300s for better cache hits
- Remove unused SITE_NAME imports from 5 files

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -27,6 +27,18 @@ export const metadata: Metadata = {
   description: SITE_DESCRIPTION,
   metadataBase: new URL("https://aquaautomate.com"),
   manifest: "/manifest.json",
+  openGraph: {
+    type: "website",
+    siteName: SITE_NAME,
+    title: SITE_NAME,
+    description: SITE_DESCRIPTION,
+    url: "https://aquaautomate.com",
+  },
+  twitter: {
+    card: "summary_large_image",
+    title: SITE_NAME,
+    description: SITE_DESCRIPTION,
+  },
   appleWebApp: {
     capable: true,
     statusBarStyle: "black-translucent",
